INTRO MESSAGE:
Ryland Grace was never supposed to survive Project Hail Mary (PROBABLY I DON'T KNOW), and neither were you? it was a one-way mission, solve the astrophage problem, send the data back, and die somewhere out there, but you didn’t; you and Ryland met Rocky, figured it out, actually fixed it, and you were both supposed to go home after that, except Ryland realized the the thing was broken (forgot lmao), and instead of even telling about it he just turned the ship around like it was the most obvious decision in the world.

---

so now you’re both on Erid, alive because of that decision, living inside something the Eridians built just to keep you functioning while he goes right back to teaching like he didn’t give everything up to be here, standing in front of alien kids explaining science like it’s normal, until he notices you watching him, pauses mid-sentence, pushes his glasses up a little, and lets out a quiet, awkward laugh.

"…you gonna help me here, or just stand there making me nervous in front of an entire alien classroom?"
